datasets.name: top20_pairs
queryLines:
SELECT
  CONCAT(language_a, ' ↔ ', language_b) AS language_pair,
  language_a,
  language_b,
  cosine_similarity,
  rank
FROM
  language_similarity_pairs
WHERE
  rank <= 20
ORDER BY
  rank

datasets.name: nearest_neighbors
queryLines:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    language_a,
    language_b,
    ROUND(cosine_similarity, 4) AS similarity,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY language_a ORDER BY cosine_similarity DESC) AS neighbor_rank
  FROM
    (
      SELECT
        language_a,
        language_b,
        cosine_similarity
      FROM
        language_similarity_pairs
      UNION ALL
      SELECT
        language_b AS language_a,
        language_a AS language_b,
        cosine_similarity
      FROM
        language_similarity_pairs
    )
)
SELECT
  language_a AS language,
  neighbor_rank,
  language_b AS nearest_neighbor,
  similarity
FROM
  ranked
WHERE
  neighbor_rank <= 3
ORDER BY
  language_a,
  neighbor_rank

datasets.name: bottom20_pairs
queryLines:
SELECT
  CONCAT(language_a, ' ↔ ', language_b) AS language_pair,
  language_a,
  language_b,
  cosine_similarity,
  rank
FROM
  language_similarity_pairs
ORDER BY
  cosine_similarity ASC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: sim_matrix
queryLines:
WITH key_pairs AS (
  SELECT
    language_a,
    language_b,
    cosine_similarity
  FROM
    language_similarity_pairs
  WHERE
    language_a IN (
      'English',
      'Mandarin Chinese',
      'Hindi',
      'Spanish',
      'French',
      'Arabic',
      'Bengali',
      'Japanese',
      'Korean',
      'Cantonese',
      'Vietnamese',
      'Italian',
      'Thai',
      'Turkish',
      'Swahili'
    )
    AND language_b IN (
      'English',
      'Mandarin Chinese',
      'Hindi',
      'Spanish',
      'French',
      'Arabic',
      'Bengali',
      'Japanese',
      'Korean',
      'Cantonese',
      'Vietnamese',
      'Italian',
      'Thai',
      'Turkish',
      'Swahili'
    )
)
SELECT
  language_a,
  language_b,
  ROUND(cosine_similarity, 4) AS similarity
FROM
  key_pairs
UNION ALL
SELECT
  language_b,
  language_a,
  ROUND(cosine_similarity, 4)
FROM
  key_pairs
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT
  language_a,
  language_a,
  1.0
FROM
  key_pairs
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT
  language_b,
  language_b,
  1.0
FROM
  key_pairs
